name: NAC Nueva Alcántara
address: Av. de Barcelona, 8, 29670 San Pedro Alcántara, Málaga
description: One of the most acclaimed padel clubs on the Costa del Sol, NAC Nueva Alcántara is the benchmark for padel excellence in Marbella. All 16 panoramic glass-walled courts are built to professional competition standards, surrounded by lush gardens and mountain views. The club offers a fine dining restaurant, physiotherapy centre, fully-stocked pro shop, and one of the most active tournament calendars on the coast.

name: Puente Romano Tennis, Padel & Fitness
description: One of the most exclusive addresses in European padel, Puente Romano's courts sit within the legendary Golden Mile resort where professional players and celebrities come to train. Four premium outdoor courts are complemented by a world-class coaching academy, Michelin-starred dining, and direct beach access — making every game feel like an event in itself.

name: Manolo Santana Racquets Club
address: Carretera de Istán, km 2, 29602 Marbella, Málaga
description: Founded in 1997 by Spain's tennis legend Manolo Santana, this prestigious club in Nueva Andalucía's Golf Valley offers 4 padel courts alongside 6 tennis courts. Regular clinics from certified coaches, a vibrant restaurant and bar, outdoor swimming pool, and an international member community make this one of the most social clubs on the coast.

name: Club de Tenis y Pádel Bel Air
address: C. del Tenis, s/n, 29688 Bel-Air, Estepona, Málaga
description: A full-service sports club between Estepona and San Pedro, Bel Air offers 4 padel courts and 9 tennis courts in a relaxed family-friendly setting. With a well-regarded restaurant serving breakfast and lunch, a swimming pool, and a comprehensive coaching academy for juniors and adults, Bel Air is a genuine community club with consistently high Google reviews.

name: Aloha Tennis & Padel Club
address: Calle Paris, 1, Nueva Andalucía, 29660 Marbella, Málaga
description: A well-loved padel and tennis club nestled in the Aloha residential area of Nueva Andalucía. The club has a loyal community of local and expat members, active weekly leagues, and a welcoming atmosphere that keeps players coming back. Conveniently located close to Puerto Banús with easy parking.

name: International Tennis Club
description: A well-established multi-surface club in central Marbella offering fast hard courts, clay, and padel courts in a unique location. The International Tennis Club has long been a favourite with the international community living in and around Marbella town, combining quality facilities with a relaxed, unpretentious atmosphere.

name: Royal Tennis Club Marbella
address: Carretera de Cádiz, 188, 29604 El Rosario, Marbella, Málaga
description: Internationally renowned tennis and padel club set in the El Rosario area, just 800 metres from the beach. Royal Tennis offers training programmes for all ages — from Mini Tennis for 4–6 year olds to competitive adult coaching — plus padel courts, a pool, and free parking. A great-value option on the eastern side of Marbella.

name: Rafa Nadal Tennis Center Marbella
description: The Marbella outpost of Rafa Nadal's global academy network, located at the Don Carlos Resort. Primarily a tennis centre with 7 clay courts, it also offers 2 padel courts with ocean views. High-performance training camps and individual lessons are available. A must-visit for serious players who want to train in the Nadal Academy tradition.

name: Los Naranjos Padel Club
address: Av. Valle Inclán, 41, 29660 Nueva Andalucía, Marbella
description: One of the largest padel clubs in Europe, just five minutes from Puerto Banús marina. Los Naranjos boasts 18 courts across indoor and outdoor settings — including one competition court, four fully covered indoor courts, and a dedicated solo practice facility. With a professional coaching academy and pickleball courts, this is the most comprehensive padel destination on the Costa del Sol.

name: Villa Padierna Racquet Club
address: Calle Adriano, Urb. Costalita, 29688 Estepona, Málaga
description: A luxurious padel experience on the Costa del Sol. Eleven courts located 50 metres from the beach, within the grounds of the five-star Villa Padierna Palace hotel. Five-star service extends to every aspect of play — private coaching, bespoke racket fitting, and post-match spa treatments are all on offer.

name: Real Club Padel Marbella
address: C. Río Amazonas, s/n, 29660 Marbella, Málaga
description: Marbella's most vibrant padel community. Real Club Padel Marbella combines six next-generation courts with an on-site gym and spa. Weekly leagues, ladies' sessions, and junior development programmes run year-round — making this the natural choice for players who want great padel and great company in central Marbella.

name: Los Monteros Racket Club
address: Calle del Lince, Urb. Los Monteros, 29603 Marbella, Málaga
description: Tucked within the exclusive Los Monteros estate east of Marbella town, this elegant racket club offers six glass padel courts in a tranquil beachside setting. Popular with residents of the surrounding villas and guests at the Kimpton Los Monteros hotel, the club has a genuine members feel with friendly staff and competitive rates.
